footer_description: Precision nutrition planning for endurance athletes.
landing_cta_body: Fuel smarter with Kilo. Start your free trial today, no credit card required.
landing_features_body: From workout analysis to supplement tracking, Kilo gives you complete control over your nutrition strategy.
landing_features_heading: Everything you need to fuel right
landing_hero_body: Kilo helps you create detailed nutrition strategies before every workout. Calculate exact carb and calorie needs based on your planned duration, power targets, and personal physiology. Review historical data to refine your approach over time.
nav_tools_description: Free tools to help you evaluate cycling performance, fuelling and anything related!
pricing_body: Start free and upgrade when you need more. No hidden fees, cancel anytime.
tools_cta_body: Kilo turns these numbers into a full nutrition plan for every workout, then tracks how it played out. Start free, no credit card required.
tools_hero_body: Free calculators for gearing, tire pressure, and fueling. When a ride needs a full nutrition plan, Kilo takes over.
tools_hero_heading: Cycling tools that are useful before you sign up.
